case_title: GAIL M. MCMAHON VS. THE CITY MEWS II OF JENNIFER PLACE HOMEOWNERS ASSO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED MAR-21-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY MEWS II OF JENNIFER PLACE HOMEOWNERS ASSO CIATION
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-02-2010 2:30 PM FOR DEPT 505
ORDER "GRANTED" ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF, SIGNED BY JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART. **(THE COURT ORDERS THIS CASE CONTINUED TO AUG-18-2010 AT3:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 505.)**
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-02-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-02-2010 BY JOHN K. STEWART

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCMAHON, GAIL M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CITY MEWS II OF JENNIFER PLACE HOMEOWNERS ASSO CIATION $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: THE SUM OF $2,000.00 FOR BREACH OF THE QUIET ENJOYMENT OF HER COND CAUSED BY GIVING ACCESS TO THE SHIPLEY GATE TO CITY MEWS I, OCCUPANTS LAST YEAR. DEFENDANT MAY SATISFYTHIS JUDGMENT BY APPLYING THE $2,000.00 TO THE PURCHASE OF NEW, QUIETER MOTOR FOR THE SHIPLEY GATE. IF THE NEW MOTOR IS NOT INSTALLED WITHIN TWELVE(12) MONTHS FROM TODAY'S DATE, THE $2,000.00 SHALL BE PAID TO PLAINTIFF WITH INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ENFORCE AN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY MEWS II OF JENNIFER PLACE HOMEOWNERS ASSO CIATION
OBJECTION TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY MEWS II OF JENNIFER PLACE HOMEOWNERS ASSO CIATION

OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT; REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT; DECLARATION OF J.L. GILIKIN IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND PROPOSED ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY MEWS II OF JENNIFER PLACE HOMEOWNERS ASSO CIATION
PLTFF'S REPLY TO DEFT. CITY MEWS HOA'S OPPOSITION TO PLTFF'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT;DECLARATION OF GAIL M. MCMAHON---FILED.
PLAINTIFF MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY DISQUALIFICATION AND DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCMAHON, GAIL M.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCMAHON, GAIL M.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MCMAHON, GAIL M. AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY MEWS II OF JENNIFER PLACE HOMEOWNERS ASSO CIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-11-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 505

calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-03-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gail McMahon, Plaintiff in pro per
J.L. Gillikan and Alex Rexroad appearing for defendant

This cause comes on regularly for Plaintiff's Motion to Enforce the Settlement Agreement

J.L. Gillikan testifies on behalf of the defendants
Gail McMahon testifies on behalf of the plaintiff

After hearing all argument, the Court denies Plaintiff's Motion to Enforce the Settlement Agreement. The Court finds that there was no enforceable agreement.

The Court takes the original claim under submission.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Continued To Sep-02-10 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 505

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Continued To Aug-18-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 505

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Continued To Jul-13-10 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gail McMahon, Plaintiff in Pro Per
J.L. Gillikan and Alex Rexroad, appearing for defendant, The City Mews II

This cause comes on regularly for small claims. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Gail McMahon testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
#C-3 Home Owner's Association -By Laws.
#1 Picture of noisy gate
#2 Picture of other gate with pedestrian gate
#3 Two pictures of other gates with pedestrian gate
#4 picture of gate with pedestrian gateway
# B Reference chart of decibel levels
# A Bid for new motor
#C-5 Civil Code 1354
J.l. Gillikan testifies on behalf of defendant The City Mews II. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
T Industrial use Zone
O Google Map
M SF Planning Dept
E pictures of Unit # 21 and # 23

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court will continue the matter for a status report and possible dismissal.

The Court holds all exhibits until the next hearing on July 13, 2010 at 2:30pm

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Continued To May-11-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505
